description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.

This pistol fires it's own custom rounds bought in packs of 18, though they cost the same as a pack of 10. Comes with a Smartgun Link*.

*Smartgun Link must be manually added after acquiring the weapon
Turns weapon into a "Smartgun". Refer to all rules specified on pg. 344 before using.
Access to nervous system.
Plating on your hand which allows you to utilise Smartguns. Requires a neural link.
Provides immunity to inhalable gases or fumes.
Light version of an Armorjack. No armor penalty.
Armor Item for Subdermal Armor Cyberware.

For use only in the Nova Model 757 Cityhunter. Comes in packs of 18 instead of the normal 10.

 

Req Targeting Scope Cyberware, otherwise won't fire. If miss single attack by 4 or less, roll second attack at same DV 1d10+10 (not normal stat). Can add luck. Target can dodge the second roll as normal if able to do so.
Eyewear with two options slots for cybereye options.
Must be paired. Provides immunity to dazzling effects (like flashbangs).
Tiny screen in your eye. Provides picture-in-picture for those boring moments.
A base interface for audio enhancements.
Built in agent. Audio only but can be linked with other cybergear.
Deals no damage. If hit roll DV15 Resist Torture/Drugs. On a fail take the Damaged Eye and Damaged Ear Critical injuries (see pg. 188) for 1 minute. No Crit damage dealt.
Provides immunity to deafness or sudden loud noises.

A basic lob or pitch of an object. Use an Action to make a Ranged Attack at up to 25m/yds. Targets can choose to Dodge your throw if they can Dodge bullets. Melee weapons deal their base damage, but don't penetrate half SP.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 4X/Isolated Elite Threat - Although they sometimes hire crews or accompany Eviction Specialists, most Scott Brown Realtors are used to working alone.

Corp-Wide Ability - Scott Brown Motherfucker, Get The Fuck Out, I've Got A Showing!: When a Scott Brown agent enters the scene, they can choose to exclaim this line. If they were not previously known, they are placed at the top of the initiative order regardless of roll, and immediately open fire. Any actors in the scene with a rep of 2 or less, (and any player characters with a COOL of 5 or lower) must succeed a DV15 Cool Endurance check (use lowdown for NPCs). On failure, any NPCs attempt to flee, while player characters are immediately suppressed with the agent(s) in the scene acting as the source of the effect. They remain suppressed until passing the check, which they can attempt to do at the start of each of their turns.

Ability - Eminent Domain: While in a scene where the realtor has knowledge of the property, they can shoot through cover with 15 HP or less as though it weren't there. Don't worry, they've got insurance to cover the damages.

Ever tried to buy property in NC without a Fixer? No? Ugh, be glad you haven't; Scott Brown is a menace.
